generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingHVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart HVAC control system actuator modeled within BIM environment for adaptive temperature regulation and energy management"
]

instance SmartLightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated lighting control actuator embedded in BIM model for dynamic lighting adjustment based on occupancy and energy optimization requirements"
]

instance AutomatedDoorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated door system actuator integrated with BIM for occupancy-based access control and energy-efficient operation"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled temperature sensor embedded within building infrastructure for real-time environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled humidity sensor integrated with BIM model for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataStream
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled occupancy sensor with motion detection capabilities for space utilization analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meter sensor capturing real-time power consumption data from building systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataStream
]

instance StructuralMonitoringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled structural health monitoring sensor for building integrity assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData StructuralDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnergyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance StructuralDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StructuralMonitoringSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMStaticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D spatial and functional BIM model containing building geometry, component relationships, and static structural information"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RevitTool
]

instance BIMRuntimeModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven runtime representation enriched with sensor metadata and control logic extracted from BIM via model transformations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data streams processed via Ditto/Eclipse Hono for synchronization with physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream, HumidityDataStream, OccupancyDataStream, EnergyDataStream, StructuralDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed data outputs from reinforcement learning models for energy efficiency optimization (e.g., adaptive lighting control)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BOREALISPlatform
]

instance BIMEnrichedMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor metadata extracted from BIM models including device IDs, control logic, and sampling rates for real-time synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

// C11: Enablers
instance RevitTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tool (Revit) used by Building Control Engineers to model devices, sensors, and actuators within the Digital Twin framework"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMRuntimeModel
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework automating transformations from BIM models to runtime artifacts (service interfaces, control logic)"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMRuntimeModel, EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time bidirectional data exchange middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for synchronization between IoT devices and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeOperationalData, PredictiveAnalyticsData
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization platform for interactive monitoring and simulation within the Digital Twin environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BOREALISPlatform : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning platform for predictive analytics and adaptive control strategies (e.g., adaptive lighting optimization)"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveOptimizationService
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular extension framework supporting domain-specific plugins for DT Engineers (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control strategies)"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegration
]

// C6: Services
instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D immersive visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for real-time monitoring and user interaction with the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides Immersive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy efficiency and operational cost optimization using predictive analytics (e.g., adaptive lighting via reinforcement learning)"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight, CostReductionAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service extension framework for deploying domain-specific plugins (e.g., IoT analytics, AI-driven control strategies)"
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsAction
]

instance RealTimeDecisionSupport : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data-driven decision support for Facility Managers enabling proactive maintenance and operational adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides ProactiveMaintenanceInsight, OperationalAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance Immersive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of building infrastructure components and operational metrics for immersive monitoring"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of energy consumption patterns for optimization opportunities across building systems"
]

instance CostReductionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated recommendations for operational adjustments to reduce energy costs (e.g., dynamic HVAC scheduling)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ProactiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time anomaly detection for building components to identify potential maintenance needs before failures occur"
]

instance OperationalAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic control adjustments based on real-time operational data (e.g., adaptive lighting based on occupancy patterns)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomAnalyticsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Domain-specific analytics processing via custom plugins deployed through standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance LivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingHVACActuator, SmartLightingActuator, AutomatedDoorActuator,
                  TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, OccupancySensor, EnergyConsumptionSensor, StructuralMonitoringSensor,
                  BIMStaticModel, BIMRuntimeModel
]

instance AECOOperationsEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains InteractiveVisualizationService, PredictiveOptimizationService, CustomServiceIntegration, RealTimeDecisionSupport,
                  EclipseHonoMiddleware, UnrealEngine5, BOREALISPlatform, StandardizedExtensionPoints
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is implemented via control signals generated by DT services (e.g., adaptive lighting, HVAC optimization) and transmitted back to physical actuators through Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware. Control logic is embedded within BIM models by **Building Control Engineers**, enabling automated commissioning and real-time adjustments. The framework supports dynamic runtime configuration without redeployment, ensuring seamless integration with BCS."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates with **real-time synchronization**, ensuring live data exchange between physical assets and the virtual model. While the exact time-scale specifics (e.g., sub-second latency) are not detailed, the framework supports **adaptive sampling rates** and **event-driven synchronization** to handle dynamic operational demands. The emphasis is on maintaining **low-latency, bidirectional communication** for seamless DT-to-physical system interactions."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is a **modular, service-oriented architecture** orchestrated via a central framework:
  - **Core components**: BIM model, runtime middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto), visualization engine (Unreal Engine), and standardized extension points.
  - **Interoperability**: Enables seamless integration with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools) via middleware APIs.
  - **Scalability**: Supports deployment from individual devices to entire building infrastructures by leveraging BIM’s hierarchical structure and modular design."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all life-cycle stages** of the building:
  - **Design phase**: Enriched BIM models with device configurations and control logic.
  - **Construction phase**: Automated extraction of physical asset metadata for DT deployment.
  - **Operational phase**: Real-time synchronization with physical systems via IoT sensors/actuators, enabling continuous monitoring and optimization (e.g., adaptive lighting via reinforcement learning in BOREALIS). The framework supports **as-designed, as-manufactured, and as-operated** representations of the physical building."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart, demonstrating interoperability and architectural soundness in the Living Lab case study.
  - **Verification/validation**: Automated model validation (e.g., clash detection) during BIM modeling and runtime synchronization checks via middleware.
  - **Uncertainty management**: Addressed by real-time data normalization and semantic coherence via MDE abstractions, reducing semantic drift between static BIM models and dynamic operational data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs a **layered system architecture** with:
  - **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for real-time data exchange, enabling bidirectional communication between physical assets and the DT.
  - **Standardized APIs** for seamless integration with BIM tools and IoT devices. The technical connection ensures low-latency, event-driven synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted using:
  - **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for runtime data management and synchronization.
  - **Unreal Engine 5** for interactive visualization.
  The deployment is designed for **scalability**, leveraging modular extension points to accommodate future enhancements. While cloud/edge deployment specifics are not detailed, the framework emphasizes **low-overhead, automated transformation** to minimize manual intervention."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is achieved through:
  - **Standardized APIs** ensuring interoperability with BIM tools (e.g., Revit, Navisworks) and AECO-specific systems.
  - **BIM-based semantic backbone** enabling seamless data exchange across heterogeneous systems.
  The framework supports **compatibility with existing AECO standards**, though specific tools like Revit/Navisworks are referenced in broader AECO contexts rather than as explicit components of this framework."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are not explicitly addressed in the documents. The framework focuses on technical integration (e.g., Hono/Ditto middleware) without detailing compliance with regulations like GDPR or access control policies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the semantic foundation for building representation.
  - **Standardized extension points** for modular service integration, ensuring scalability and interoperability.
  The framework leverages **existing AECO standards** but does not explicitly mention protocols like MQTT or REST as open standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are not explicitly addressed in the documents. The focus is on technical integration (e.g., Hono/Ditto for real-time data exchange) and runtime adaptability, without mentioning encryption, authentication, or safety protocols for remote operations."
]
